description.value: You have an affinity for riding animals of all shapes and sizes, and you haven't met a mount that you aren't willing to ride. You become trained in Nature. If you would automatically become trained in Nature (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Ride] general feat and gain a +1 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Command an Animal] if the target is trained as a mount.
